1. <Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
2.   <PropertyGroup>
3.     <TargetFramework>net9.0</TargetFramework>
4.     <IsPackable>false</IsPackable>
5.     <TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport>true</TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport>
6.   </PropertyGroup>
7.   <ItemGroup>
8.     <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk" Version="17.13.0" />
9.     <PackageReference Include="MSTest" Version="3.8.0" />
10.     <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.HotReload" Version="1.5.3" />
11.   </ItemGroup>
12. </Project>
13.
